skill.name: maxhub-xiaohongshu
skill.description: 小红书全场景数据查询助手。支持App和Web多版本API，覆盖笔记详情、用户数据、搜索、商品、评论、话题等全功能。
skill.summary: Query Xiaohongshu data across notes, users, search, products, and topics using the MaxHub API with 77+ endpoints.
skill.author: XieWxx

security_audit.summary: This skill requires curl execution, API key environment variables, and network requests to function as a Xiaohongshu data query tool. All static findings (external_commands via curl, env_access for MAXHUB_API_KEY, network URLs) are consistent with the skill's documented purpose and are expected behavior. No prompt injection attempts or malicious intent detected. The skill transparently documents its data handling practices including credential transmission.

high_findings.title: Environment Variable Access for API Credentials
high_findings.description: The skill accesses MAXHUB_API_KEY from environment variables and transmits it via Authorization header to a third-party API service. This is expected for the skill's functionality but represents credential exposure to an external service.
high_findings.confidence_reasoning: Pattern confirmed - MAXHUB_API_KEY is accessed and transmitted to external API. The skill transparently documents this, making it expected behavior rather than malicious.

medium_findings.title: External Command Execution via curl
medium_findings.description: The skill instructs the AI agent to execute curl commands to query the MaxHub API. This is the core functionality of the skill and is explicitly documented. All curl commands use documented API endpoints and require user-provided API keys.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Pattern confirmed across multiple files - curl execution is the skill's intended operation pattern. Hardcoded arguments, no user input injection vector.

medium_findings.title: Proxy Parameter in API Documentation
medium_findings.description: One API endpoint (get_visitor_cookie) accepts SOCKS5/HTTP proxy parameters. This is documented as an optional API parameter for legitimate multi-region data collection, not as a malicious configuration.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Proxy parameter exists in API documentation, but it is a documented optional parameter for the MaxHub API service. No evidence of malicious proxy configuration.

low_findings.title: Hardcoded URLs in Documentation
low_findings.description: Hardcoded URLs to xiaohongshu.com, xhslink.com, and aconfig.cn appear in documentation files. These are legitimate API documentation references, not malicious endpoints.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: URLs are to legitimate domains (aconfig.cn, xiaohongshu.com, xhslink.com) documented as API service endpoints. No evidence of data exfiltration.

low_findings.title: HTTP URLs Flagged as Weak Crypto
low_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged http:// URLs as 'weak cryptographic algorithm'. These are standard HTTP URLs in markdown documentation (short links, API examples), not cryptographic algorithm usage.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Clearly a false positive - HTTP URLs in API documentation tables are not cryptographic algorithm usage.

low_findings.title: C2 Keywords and Reconnaissance False Positives
low_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged standard API parameter names and endpoint paths as 'C2 keywords' and 'system reconnaissance'. These are standard API documentation items like item_id, user_id, and endpoint URLs.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: API documentation parameter tables are not C2 infrastructure. Clear false positive from pattern-based detection.

low_findings.title: High File Entropy False Positive
low_findings.description: Static analyzer flagged references/api-note.md for high entropy (6.01 bits). This is a multilingual markdown file with mixed Chinese and English content, not obfuscated or encrypted data.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: High entropy is from natural Chinese/English mixed content in API documentation. Not obfuscation.

dangerous_patterns.title: Credential Transmission to Third-Party API
dangerous_patterns.description: The MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable is transmitted as a Bearer token in HTTP headers to https://www.aconfig.cn. This is transparently documented in SKILL.md security section but represents credential sharing with an external service.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: Credential transmission to third-party is confirmed and documented. Users should be aware their API key is sent to an external service.

dangerous_patterns.title: Autonomous Command Execution
dangerous_patterns.description: The skill instructs the AI to execute all planned queries autonomously, including curl commands with the API key. This is the intended design but means the AI will autonomously make network requests with credentials.
dangerous_patterns.confidence_reasoning: Clear instruction for autonomous execution exists in SKILL.md. Expected for API query skills but documented as a pattern requiring user awareness.

content.user_title: Query Xiaohongshu Data Across Notes, Users, and Trends
content.value_statement: Manually collecting Xiaohongshu data across notes, users, search, and products is time-consuming and fragmented. This skill provides instant access to 77+ API endpoints through a single API key, enabling comprehensive Xiaohongshu data queries with autonomous multi-step execution.
actual_capabilities: Query note details, comments, and sub-comments from Xiaohongshu using App and Web API versions
Search and analyze user profiles, follower lists, and posted content metadata
Execute keyword searches across notes, users, products, images, and trending topics
Retrieve product information, reviews, review summaries, and topic feed data
Perform multi-step queries such as full KOL analysis or deep trend comparison
Autonomous execution of planned queries with parallel independent calls
limitations: Requires a valid MaxHub API key to function - no free tier is documented
Some endpoints require platform session cookies which carry additional privacy risk
Data from third-party APIs may have delays compared to official platform data
Subject to API rate limits (429 errors) and endpoint availability changes

use_cases.title: Content Trend Research
use_cases.description: Search for notes by keyword, analyze engagement metrics, and extract content patterns for brand strategy.

use_cases.title: KOL Evaluation for Partnerships
use_cases.description: Find creators in a target niche, review their follower counts, engagement rates, and content themes to select partners.

use_cases.title: Consumer Sentiment Monitoring
use_cases.description: Monitor product reviews, comment sentiment, and topic trends to track brand perception over time.

prompt_templates.title: Simple Note Lookup
prompt_templates.prompt: Find a Xiaohongshu note by sharing link and show me the detail.
prompt_templates.scenario: Quick lookup of a single note's information

prompt_templates.title: User Profile Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for users posting about skincare and analyze their profile and recent notes.
prompt_templates.scenario: Identifying and evaluating content creators in a niche

prompt_templates.title: Keyword Search with Summary
prompt_templates.prompt: Search for notes about 'organic skincare' and give me a summary of the top results with engagement stats.
prompt_templates.scenario: Researching content around a specific keyword or topic

prompt_templates.title: Deep Competitive Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Compare notes and engagement for brand A and brand B on Xiaohongshu. Give me a side-by-side analysis.
prompt_templates.scenario: Comparing two brands or products using multi-endpoint orchestration

output_examples.input: Show me the top 5 notes about 'running shoes'
output_examples.output:
Here are the top 5 notes about running shoes:

1. **10 Best Running Shoes for 2025**
   - Author: fitnesstracker
   - Likes: 12.5K | Comments: 342
   - Summary: Detailed review of cushioning and support

2. **My Marathon Training Gear**
   - Author: runnerlife
   - Likes: 8.3K | Comments: 215
   - Summary: Personal experience with 3 brands

Key findings: Cushioning and arch support are the most discussed features.

output_examples.input: Analyze user 'beautycreator' and their recent notes
output_examples.output:
Analyzing user 'beautycreator':

**Profile**:
- Followers: 45.2K | Following: 312
- Notes: 187 total

**Recent Notes Analysis**:
| Topic | Notes | Avg Likes |
|---|---|---|
| Skincare | 12 | 3.2K |
| Makeup | 8 | 2.1K |
| Reviews | 5 | 4.5K |

**Key findings**: Product reviews have highest engagement. Skincare content drives most follower growth.

output_examples.input: Compare engagement rates for topic 'vegan food' vs 'plant-based recipes'
output_examples.output:
Comparison: Vegan Food vs Plant-Based Recipes

| Metric | Vegan Food | Plant-Based Recipes |
|---|---|---|
| Avg Notes/Day | 23 | 18 |
| Avg Likes | 1.5K | 2.3K |
| Avg Comments | 89 | 156 |

Key findings: Plant-based recipes get 53% more comments, suggesting higher discussion engagement. Vegan food has broader volume but lower interaction depth.

best_practices: Configure your API key before starting queries using the documented environment variable or platform config method
Start with simple single-endpoint queries to verify API access, then progress to multi-step deep analysis
Use the language that matches your output preference - Chinese prompts return Chinese output with wan/yi number format
anti_patterns: Do not hardcode API keys or session cookies directly in conversation prompts - use the configured environment variable instead
Do not request all available endpoints at once in a single query - plan targeted queries based on your specific research goal
Do not expect real-time data freshness - third-party API data may have latency compared to official Xiaohongshu platform

faq.question: How do I get a MaxHub API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Sign up at https://www.aconfig.cn, go to the API Keys section in your dashboard, and create a new key. Then set it as the MAXHUB_API_KEY environment variable or use your platform's config tool.

faq.question: What kind of data can this skill query from Xiaohongshu?
faq.answer: This skill can query note details, comments, user profiles, search results, product information, topic feeds, and trending data. It supports both App and Web API versions with 77+ endpoints.

faq.question: Does this skill modify data on Xiaohongshu?
faq.answer: No. This skill is designed for read-only data queries. It does not perform any write operations, posting, or automated actions on Xiaohongshu.

faq.question: What languages does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill supports both Chinese and English. The response language and number format (wan/yi for Chinese, K/M/B for English) automatically match the user's detected language.

faq.question: What should I do if I get a 429 rate limit error?
faq.answer: A 429 error means you have exceeded the API rate limit. Wait before making additional queries and reduce the frequency of your requests.

faq.question: Is my API key safe when using this skill?
faq.answer: Your API key is sent to the MaxHub API service (https://www.aconfig.cn) as an Authorization header with each request. The skill documentation states the provider does not store credentials beyond the request lifecycle. Do not share your API key with untrusted parties.
